intro.uz: "The Big Picture" — Dennis Littky kitobidan: haqiqiy oʻrganish yod olish emas, bilimni ishlatish va bogʻlashdir. AJ bugungi kichik dars emas, butun umr yoʻlini koʻrishga chaqiradi. Bu haftaning ikki grammatikasi aynan shu "katta manzara" tili: kelasi mukammal va davomiy zamon (will have done; will be doing) hamda payt ergash gaplari (when / as soon as / until + hozirgi zamon). Athena haqidagi POV hikoyada uzoq rejani eshitasiz.
intro.en: "The Big Picture" comes from Dennis Littky's book: real learning is not memorizing but using and connecting knowledge. AJ asks you to see not today's small lesson but the whole arc of your life. This week's two grammar topics are the language of that big picture: the future perfect and future continuous (will have done; will be doing) and future time clauses (when / as soon as / until + present). You'll hear a long plan in the POV story about Athena.

canDo.uz: Dars oxirida kelajakning bir nuqtasidan turib rejangizni tasvirlab bera olasiz ("By 2030 I will have reached B2; this time next year I will be speaking freely") va uzoq rejaning bosqichlarini when/as soon as/until bilan toʻgʻri bogʻlay olasiz (when dan keyin will ishlatmasdan).
canDo.en: By the end you can describe your plan from a point in the future ("By 2030 I will have reached B2; this time next year I will be speaking freely") and link the stages of a long plan with when/as soon as/until correctly (no will after when).

grammar.titleUz: Kelasi mukammal va davomiy: will have done; will be doing
grammar.bandLifter: IELTS Part 2 — describe future plans and where you'll be by a certain time
grammar.cefrCanDo: B1→B2: I can say what I will have finished and what I will be doing at a future time
grammar.contrastUz: Oʻzbek tili ikki maʼnoni koʻpincha oddiy kelasi zamon bilan beradi ("tugataman", "gaplashayotgan boʻlaman"). Ingliz tili esa aniq ajratadi: kelajakka borib tugagan ish — will have + V3; kelajakda davom etayotgan ish — will be + V-ing. "by + vaqt" koʻpincha future perfect bilan keladi.
grammar.errorFixUz: ❌ By 2030 I will reach B2. ✅ By 2030 I will have reached B2. "by + kelajak vaqti" bilan ish oʻsha vaqtga borib tugagan boʻladi, shuning uchun will have + V3 (oddiy will do emas).

examples.en: By next summer I will have finished this course.
examples.uz: Kelasi yozga borib bu kursni tugatgan boʻlaman.

examples.en: This time next year I will be speaking English at work.
examples.uz: Kelasi yili shu payt men ishda inglizcha gaplashayotgan boʻlaman.

examples.en: In ten years Athena will have learned 55 languages.
examples.uz: Oʻn yildan keyin Athena 55 tilni oʻrgangan boʻladi.

exercises.hintUz: "by + kelajak vaqti" → oʻsha vaqtga borib tugagan ish: will have + V3

exercises.prompt: This time tomorrow we ___ on the plane.
exercises.hintUz: kelajakning bir onida davom etayotgan ish → will be + V-ing
oʻsha payt ish davom etayotgan boʻladi → will be sleeping

exercises.promptUz: Oʻzingiz haqingizda rost gap ayting (ovoz chiqarib): "By this time next year, I will have … . And I will be … -ing."
exercises.hintUz: will have + V3 (tugagan) va will be + V-ing (davom etayotgan)

grammar.titleUz: Payt ergash gaplari: when / as soon as / until + hozirgi zamon
grammar.titleEn: Future time clauses (when / as soon as / until)
grammar.bandLifter: IELTS Part 2 — sequence the stages of a long-term plan smoothly
grammar.cefrCanDo: B1→B2: I can link future stages with when/as soon as/until using the present (no will after when)
grammar.contrastUz: Oʻzbekchada ikkala qism ham kelasi zamonda boʻlaveradi: "Tugatganimda topshiraman". Ingliz tilida esa when / as soon as / until / before dan keyin feʼl hozirgi zamonda qoladi (will yoʻq), will faqat asosiy qismda turadi. "until" koʻpincha "…maguncha / …gacha" ga toʻgʻri keladi.
grammar.errorFixUz: ❌ When I will finish the course, I will take IELTS. ✅ When I finish the course, I will take IELTS. "when" soʻzining oʻzi kelajakni bildiradi, shuning uchun undan keyin will qoʻshilmaydi — "when dan keyin will yoʻq".

examples.en: When I finish this course, I will take IELTS.
As soon as I am fluent, I will apply for the job.
examples.uz: Ravon gapira boshlashim bilan, ishga ariza beraman.

examples.en: I won't stop until I reach B2.

exercises.prompt: When I ___ the course, I will take the exam.
exercises.hintUz: when dan keyin will yoʻq → hozirgi zamon: finish

exercises.prompt: As soon as she ___ home, she will call you.
exercises.hintUz: as soon as + he/she/it → hozirgi zamon + -s: gets

exercises.prompt: I will keep practising ___ it becomes easy.

exercises.promptUz: Kelajak rejangizni bogʻlab ayting: "When I …, I will … . As soon as I …, I will … . I won't stop until I … ."
exercises.hintUz: payt qismi hozirgi zamonda, asosiy qism will bilan

vocab.uz: katta manzara, umumiy koʻrinish (mayda tafsilotlar emas)
vocab.defEn: the whole situation, not just small details
vocab.example: Don't focus on the test — look at the big picture.

vocab.defEn: to force yourself to remember something
vocab.example: Real learning is not memorizing facts.

vocab.defEn: to mix or combine things together in a useful way
vocab.example: You have to integrate new words with what you already know.

vocab.uz: taniqli, obroʻli mutaxassis (ishida usta boʻlgani uchun)
vocab.example: Seymour Sarason was a noted psychology expert.

vocab.defEn: a healing treatment for the body or mind
vocab.example: Patients often improve between therapy sessions.
Schools primarily teach kids how to take tests.

vocab.defEn: a player or participant in a competition or show
vocab.example: You only need that skill if you're a contestant on a quiz show.

vocab.uz: loyihaga asoslangan taʼlim (test emas, amaliy ish orqali)
vocab.defEn: learning by creating real projects instead of taking tests
vocab.example: His classes were project-based, not textbook-based.

vocab.defEn: to show and explain your work to a group
vocab.example: At the end, the students gave a presentation instead of a test.
AJ wants to awaken your passion for learning.

warmup.uz: Bu suhbatda er-xotin fermaga koʻchib oʻtishni orzu qiladi, lekin ferma hayotini umuman bilmaydi. "Katta manzara" mavzusiga mos: orzu chiroyli, biroq uni amalda qilish butunlay boshqa narsa — xuddi maktab bilan haqiqiy hayot orasidagi farq kabi. Sizningcha, qahramon fermada qola oladimi yoki shaharga qaytadimi?
warmup.en: In this dialogue a couple dream of moving to a farm, but they know nothing about farm life. It fits the Big Picture theme: the dream is lovely, yet actually doing it is a different thing entirely — like the gap between school and real life. Do you think the character will stay on the farm or go back to the city?

keyVocab.defEn: rural areas, away from the city
to feed on grass in a meadow or pasture
to get the milk from a cow

keyVocab.en: not know the first thing about
keyVocab.defEn: to know little or nothing about something
a building where horses and cattle are kept and fed
to be able to manage or cope with something successfully

quiz.q: How much has the average temperature of the Earth's surface increased in the last hundred years?
quiz.qUz: Soʻnggi yuz yilda Yer yuzasining oʻrtacha harorati qanchaga koʻtarildi?
quiz.explanationUz: Toʻgʻri javob: a) 0.85°C. Neil c) 8.5°C dedi va xato qildi. Oxirida Alice haqiqiy raqam 0.85°C ekanini aytadi va eng issiq 14 yildan 13 tasi 21-asrga toʻgʻri kelishini qoʻshimcha qiladi.

vocab.uz: yil fasliga xos boʻlmagan holda (masalan, yozda sovuq)
vocab.defEn: in a way that is not normal for the time of year
to make something less harmful or less severe
removing the salt and other minerals from sea water

vocab.uz: mahalliy ishlab chiqarilgan, oʻz yurtida yetishtirilgan

vocab.defEn: good value for the money you paid

funEnglish.title: 3 ways to plan for the (very) long term | Ari Wallach

speakingPrompt.en: Look at the big picture of your English journey. Where will you be in a few years — what will you have achieved, and what will you be doing? And how will you get there: when you finish this course, what will you do next, and what won't you stop doing until you succeed?
speakingPrompt.uz: Taxminan 60 soniya gapiring. Bu haftaning ikki grammatikasidan foydalaning: kelasi mukammal va davomiy zamon (By … I will have …; This time next year I will be … -ing) hamda payt ergash gaplari (When I …, as soon as I …, until I … — bularda will ishlatmang).
